summary: Frontend-only review of the 5 user-requested changes (sticky buy-box layout, shop-vs-public header switch, wording fixes, modern ProductCard, sticky collection toolbar). Tested 4 buyable + 1 non-buyable project page (desktop 1920x800 and mobile 390x844), the engagement-rings collection page, homepage 'Shop the Edit', cart drawer/page, and Stripe checkout redirect. ALL critical flows pass. No frontend bugs found.

tests_executed.homepage_shop_the_edit: PASS — home-engagement-section shows 3 modern cards with From price

critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetailPage.js is large (~632 lines). Consider splitting into sub-components (GallerySection, SpecsAside, JourneySection, RelatedSection) for maintainability — not a bug.

ProductCard.js correctly lazy-mounts hover video via `warm` state on first hover — good practice; verified hover-video testid not present for current demo projects (no video media in seed data), so image crossfade was the only hover behavior tested, as expected per main-agent note.
No console errors observed; only TikTok Pixel 'Invalid Event Name Format' warnings (pre-existing analytics warning, not related to this session's changes).
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded projects (4-41-carat-radiant-hidden-halo-engagement-ring, 3-40-carat-oval-side-stone-engagement-ring, 5-carat-oval-solitaire-engagement-ring) and the temporary 'test-quote-only-piece' non-buyable project (kept intact for main agent cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 user-requested frontend changes are verified working at both 1920x800 and 390x844. Stripe checkout redirect verified with $2,850 cart (test mode). No outstanding issues. 'Crafted by The Local Jewel' wording is only rendered when project has at least one spec field populated — current demo projects have empty specs so the 'What you get' aside doesn't render; code path at ProjectDetailPage.js:385 confirms wording is correct.
